description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.8 Docker image, includes the Jobs/SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template, defines stages style, build, test, coverage, examples, and deploy, and sets a global before_script to install tox. Add a style job in the style stage that runs `apt update && apt install -y --no-install-recommends git` then `pip install pre-commit`, caches the path `${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cache/pre-commit` via the PRE_COMMIT_HOME variable, and executes `pre-commit run --all-files --show-diff-on-failure`. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel` and publishes the `dist/` directory as an artifact that expires in one week. Add a test:linux job in the test stage and an examples:linux job in the examples stage that both extend a matrix template running on python:3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11, install tox in before_script, and execute `tox -vv` with TOXENV set to `py` for test and `examples` for examples (examples runs only on tags); add a coverage job in the coverage stage that runs `tox -vv`, installs codecov, and uploads coverage with `codecov --token=$CODECOV_TOKEN` using TOXENV=coverage. Finally, add a deploy job in the deploy stage that depends on the build job, runs only on tags matching the regex `^2\..*$` (excluding branches), installs twine, and uploads the built wheels with `twine upload -u $PYPI_USER -p $PYPI_PASSWORD dist/*` to PyPI.
